hooks.command: bash -c 'repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; hook="$repo/scripts/agent-hooks/stop-evaluate-skill.sh"; test -f "$hook" || exit 0; exec bash "$hook"'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking changed skills for plugin-eval evaluate-skill prompt

hooks.command: bash -c 'repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; hook="$repo/scripts/agent-hooks/stop-plugin-eval.sh"; test -f "$hook" || exit 0; exec bash "$hook"'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking plugin metadata for plugin-eval prompt
